user_query: Help me find a market in Aukland where I can buy fishing gear. Give me information about nearby fishing spots and the types of fish available. Provide details about the different fish species, including their scientific classification and habitats.

TaskList.description: Search for markets in Auckland that specialize in fishing gear.
Gather information on nearby fishing spots in Auckland.
Compile a list of types of fish available in the nearby fishing spots.
Research details about different fish species, including their scientific classification and habitats.
